description: Plugin-distributed hooks for developer-relations. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks when the plugin is installed. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the plugin's install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: flags 3 mechanically-detectable DevRel smells in content/strategy files (.md/.mdx) — (1) a quickstart/tutorial fenced code block with no runnable language tag (```bash/python/...), (2) a DevRel goal stated only in vanity metrics (raw follower/star/view counts) with no activation/TTFHW/funnel metric nearby, (3) a 'time to first hello world' / quickstart doc that never names a measurable success criterion. Set DEVREL_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
